retry_reason: Failure indicates the object ID does not exist or is already destroyed; retrying with the same ID will not succeed.
contract_summary: Destroys a uverbs object identified by `id`. Internally acquires a reference via `__uobj_get_destroy` (which may fail if the object does not exist) and then releases it via `uobj_put_destroy` to complete destruction. The caller must check the return value: 0 on success, negative error on failure. After a successful return, the object is destroyed and must not be accessed. This function does not transfer any reference to the caller; it manages all refcount operations internally.
